---
name: Experiment proposal
about: Propose a substantial experiment or architectural change
title: "[Experiment] <short title>"
labels: experiment
---

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md: substantial experiments should be proposed before a PR. -->

## Research question

State one falsifiable research question.

## Motivation

Why does this result matter for GPU LLM inference systems?

## Proposed implementation

What code, configuration, or scheduling policy will change?

## Correctness plan

Reference, tolerance, and quality gate.

## Benchmark plan

Workload, metrics, repetitions, and statistical treatment.

## Expected profiler evidence

Which profiler artifacts will confirm or reject the hypothesis?

## Hardware requirements

Instance family, GPU count, interconnect, and any topology constraints.
